title: Red Nebula comet field
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Red}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Red_Nebula_Comet_Field.jpg]] |name=Red Nebula comet field |region=[[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] |sector= |system=[[Red Nebula system]] |coordinates=G-21 |xyz= |distance= |suns=[[Sun of the Planet of the Red Nebula]] |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=[[Comet/Legends|Comet field]] |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|The place is ''alive'' with comets and meteors…!''"
"''Fragments of long exploded stars and planets… they form the ''dust'' of the Red Nebula.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Klysk]]|[[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]]}} The '''Red Nebula comet field''' was a dangerous barrier that ringed the [[Red Nebula/Legends|Red Nebula]]. It was formed when the [[Nebula/Legends|Nebula]] was separated from the rest of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. Its presence lead to the devastation of the [[Planet of the Red Nebula]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 50}} {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Comets]] [[Category:Red Nebula locations]]
